title: CVE-2026-31381, CVE-2026-31382: Gainsight Assist Information Disclosure and Cros

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-31381, CVE-2026-31382: Gainsight Assist Information
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/23
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*app.gainsight.com*'
            - '*www.rapid7.com*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
